title: CPH2749_16.0.3.503(EX01) is available
description:
New version: CPH2749_16.0.3.503(EX01)

Delight in details

• Optimizes touch control experience.

• Improves system stability.

• Integrates the February 2026 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
